# Core Language and Syntax

Use these references to confirm language behavior and built-in APIs.

- [ECMAScript Language Specification](https://tc39.es/ecma262/) - Definitive language spec.
- [MDN JavaScript Guide](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/JavaScript/Guide) - High-level learning path.
- [MDN JavaScript Reference](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/JavaScript/Reference) - Built-ins, operators, and syntax details.
